indications.text:
Tradename is indicated for topical application in the treatment of acne vulgaris. In view of the potential
for diarrhea, bloody diarrhea and pseudomembranous colitis, the physician should consider whether other
agents are more appropriate. (See CONTRAINDICATIONS, WARNINGS, and ADVERSE
REACTIONS.)
